MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-01-2012 IN 206, DEFENDANT BRYAN JAY BOWERS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DATES. DAVID TATE APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. MICHAEL BROWN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/14/12 IS CONTINUED TO 6/4/12 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY IS RE-OPENED ON THE ISSUE OF PLAINTIFF'S SUBSEQUENT MOTOR VEHICLE ACCIDENT OF 7/21/11 INCLUDING THE NATURE OF THE ACCIDENT INJURIES AND TREATMENT. THIS DISCOVERY SHALL BE CONCLUDED 30 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL PER CCP. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
